nasb.text: When the Lord has washed away the filth of the daughters of Zion and purged the bloodshed of Jerusalem from her midst, by the spirit of judgment and the spirit of burning,

esv.text: when the Lord shall have washed away the filth of the daughters of Zion and cleansed the bloodstains of Jerusalem from its midst by a spirit of judgment and by a spirit of burning.

cnv.text: 主要用審判的靈和焚燒的靈把錫安女子的污穢洗去，又把耶路撒冷中間的血腥洗淨。

csbs.text: 因为主必藉着审判之灵和焚烧之灵，洗净锡安女子的污秽，又除净耶路撒冷中杀人流血的罪。
